defaultAccounts.bio: I am the administrator of the Hoops Hawaii app. I oversee the management of user accounts, court information, and ensure that the app runs smoothly for all users.
I am a basketball enthusiast who loves to play and watch the game. I have been playing basketball since I was a kid and enjoy competing with friends at local courts.
